notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Bryan Woo. Jackson Holliday scores. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Holliday GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Holliday grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Jackson Holliday out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Blaze Alexander. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Blaze Alexander. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
